query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_nba_games,
  SUM(CASE WHEN awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_model_spread,
  SUM(CASE WHEN modelTotal IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_model_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN modelAwayML IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_model_ml,
  SUM(CASE WHEN spreadEdge IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_spread_edge,
  SUM(CASE WHEN totalEdge IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_total_edge
FROM games WHERE sport = 'NBA';
